title: Bit O’ Bovva
description: Guy Ritchie’s latest gritty crime comedy about a young Londoner down on his luck.
quote: Tell Rosie, that filthy scrubba, her fish and chips were the best.
parent: Don’t Trust the B---- in Apartment 23
altHero: James Van Der Beek in a dirty alley, wearing a big chain and fedora, holding up a stack of cash
